items.name_cn:
🆕 【Bloom Bucket Bag】M13843 Black
Combining smooth calfskin and Monogram canvas trim, it establishes its identity with a Monogram floral base and shiny metal hardware, inspired by the brand's Silhouette heel silhouette. The chic structure accommodates a phone and other daily essentials, while a detachable shoulder strap and handle offer multiple carrying options.
Size: 16 x 21 x 21 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M24905 White
items.name_cn:
🆕 M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag
This spacious Neverfull MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, featuring colorful Monogram Blossoms. Sixty-six colorful threads, in subtle gradient colors, are interwoven to create a jacquard pattern. Attached to the long shoulder strap is a laser-engraved mirror charm. It includes a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

items.name_en: 🆕 M24708 White Denim
items.name_cn:
🆕 M24708 White Denim
OnTheGo MM Handbag Nautical Series
This OnTheGo MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, made from Monogram Zph jacquard fabric created with 66 different colored threads featuring soft color gradients. To ensure durability, the fabric is treated with an invisible protective coating. Each model comes with a laser-engraved mirror charm for a touch of polish on the go. Dimensions: 35×27×14 cm

items.name_en: 30 Montaigne Mini Drawstring Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
30 Montaigne Mini Drawstring Bucket Bag
Blue Oblique print fabric
Code: S2374UTZQ
This mini drawstring bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a casual and elegant design. Crafted with blue Oblique print fabric and other materials, it features a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo on the front and a drawstring compartment to hold various daily essentials. It comes with an adjustable chain shoulder strap with leather accents, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody for a comfortable experience.
Main: Cotton, calfskin, technical fabric
Lining: Sheepskin, technical fabric
Front with CD logo
Drawstring closure
Internal compartment
3 card slots
Adjustable shoulder strap, chain part made of vintage gold-finish metal links with leather accents
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 16 x 18.5 x 13 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder and 1 mobile phone

items.name_en: DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Waxed Leather Black Large]
items.name_cn:
DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Waxed Leather Black Large]
This Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a unique casual and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth stitching. The spacious interior features a compartment and a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a leather drawstring closure for secure storage and a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure with adjustable sides to elevate the style. The large size features a leather handle with adjustable details, suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
CD Lock and drawstring closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2823
Dimensions: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm
Handle length: 14 - 29 cm. 000820
